title: EEG: RL Task (3-Armed Bandit) with alcohol cues in hazardous drinkers and ctls
description: A derivative EEG dataset from a reinforcement learning task (3-armed bandit) examining decision-making and cue reactivity in hazardous drinkers versus controls. Data were collected from 53 community participants between 2019-2021 and processed using the NEMAR-pipeline. This dataset investigates electrophysiological markers of aberrant exploration patterns in response to alcohol versus beverage cues.
methods_description: EEG data were collected during a 3-armed bandit reinforcement learning task with alcohol and beverage cues. Data were processed using the NEMAR-pipeline (version bcb79cb), a validated EEG preprocessing pipeline. HED version 8.1.0 was used for event annotation.
